title: gymnadenia × pyrenaeensis
intro: Gymnadenia × pyrenaeensis is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Gymnadenia conopsea and Gymnadenia densiflora. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. Gymnadenia × pyrenaeensis is believed to offer health benefits such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and providing antioxidant effects due to its flavonoid and phenolic compounds. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional remedies to treat coughs, colds, and skin irritations.
